mushin-squidley-v2.name: Mushin Squidley V2
mushin-squidley-v2.notes: Primary Squidley V2 instance on Mushin. Hardened gateway, structured receipts, Velum privacy layer, multi-model routing. Reachable over Tailscale.

mushin-squidley-v2-local.name: Mushin Squidley V2 (Local)
mushin-squidley-v2-local.notes: Same as above, direct local network access.
